name: Na Mea Hawaii
tagline: The best shop on Oahu for genuinely Hawaiian-made gifts — koa wood bowls, lauhala weaving, and books by Native Hawaiian authors.
bestTime: Weekday afternoons; check for cultural workshops and author events
talkStory: The single best shop on Oahu for gifts and goods that are genuinely Hawaiian-made. From hand-carved koa wood bowls to books by Native Hawaiian authors, lauhala weaving, and Hawaiian music, everything here supports Hawaiian artisans and cultural practitioners. The staff is knowledgeable and passionate. Locals come here for meaningful gifts, not the cheap made-in-China souvenirs you find in Waikiki. Regular cultural workshops and events.
